hero.headline: We Build Websites, AI Agents & Automation Systems
hero.description: Apne business ko grow karne ke liye modern technology ka use karein. Hum websites, AI chatbots aur automation systems banate hain.

services.title: Hum Kya Karte Hain?
services.subtitle: Yeh services hum apne clients ko provide karte hain
services.default1Desc: Modern, fast websites jo mobile par bhi perfectly kaam karein aur customers ko attract karein.
services.default2Desc: AI chatbot jo 24/7 aapke customers se baat kare aur automatically leads generate kare.
services.default3Desc: Repetitive kaam ko automate karein — emails, invoices, follow-ups sab automatic.

howItWorks.title: Kaise Kaam Hota Hai?
howItWorks.subtitle: Sirf 3 simple steps mein shuru karein
howItWorks.step1Desc: Form bharein ya call karein, hum sunenge aapki zarurat.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Hum aapke liye ek custom plan tayaar karenge.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Hum build karenge aur aapka project live kar denge.

portfolio.title: Humare Projects
portfolio.subtitle: Yeh kuch projects hain jo humne apne clients ke liye banaye hain
portfolio.emptyTitle: Abhi koi project add nahi hua hai
portfolio.emptySubtitle: Admin panel mein jaakar projects add karein

contact.title: Free Consultation Book Karein
contact.subtitle: Neeche form bharein, hum 24 ghante ke andar aapko contact karenge.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Apne project ke baare mein batayein...
contact.footerNote: Bilkul free hai. Koi hidden charges nahi.

chatbot.title: Chat Support
chatbot.greeting: Namaste! 🙏 Main aapki kaise madad kar sakta hoon?
chatbot.reply: Dhanyavaad! 🙌 Humari team jaldi aapse contact karegi. Aap neeche form bhi bhar sakte hain.
